title: Suki Gifts International Yomiko Classics Dogs Small Border Terrier Plush Toy
features: SSuki Classics are the most realistic animal creations at affordable prices in a true celebration of Nature's workmanship. Collect them all.
Part of the Suki classics lifelike animals collections
description: Product Description Premium quality soft boa plush dog with realistic features, soft fur and airbrushed details. Suki Classics offer a broad collection of realistically styled animals, many of which are uniquely enhanced with air brushed features. Approximately 5 inches (12.7 cm) high. Suitable for all ages. Hand wash and air dry. Other sizes and friends also available in the Classics range of sitting and lying cats, dogs and jungle animals. Please remove all tags before giving this to a child. Safety Warning Remove all tags before giving to children Box Contains 1x Plush See more
